title: Dekton 16'' Toolbox With Lid Storage & Lift Outcarry Tray- 16"-41cm|7 Storage Compartments| Dimensions: 200mm X 410mm X 180mm| Ideal For Engineers, Workshops And Tool Storage| Durable Carry Handle
features: Versatile Storage Solution: The Dekton 16" Toolbox features seven strategically designed compartments, allowing you to organize and store various tools, accessories, and small parts efficiently. Ideal for engineers, workshops, and general tool storage, it ensures that all your essentials are easily accessible and neatly arranged.

Convenient Dimensions: With overall dimensions of 200mm x 410mm x 180mm, this toolbox provides ample space for your tools while remaining compact enough for easy storage and transport. The 16" (41cm) size strikes the perfect balance between capacity and portability, making it suitable for both professional and home use.

Lift-Out Carry Tray: The toolbox comes with a practical lift-out carry tray, which offers additional storage for smaller items or frequently used tools. This feature enhances convenience by allowing you to quickly access or transport essential tools separately from the main compartment.

Durable Construction: Built with robust materials, this toolbox is designed to withstand the rigors of daily use. Its durable construction ensures longevity, even in demanding work environments. The sturdy design provides reliable protection for your tools, keeping them safe and secure.

Ergonomic Carry Handle: Equipped with a durable carry handle, the toolbox is designed for comfortable and easy transportation. The handle is ergonomically crafted to provide a secure grip, reducing strain during transport and making it easier to move your tools from one location to another.
description: Discover the ultimate solution for your storage needs with the Dekton 16'' Toolbox with Lid Storage and Lift-Out Carry Tray. Designed for engineers, workshops, and all tool enthusiasts, this versatile toolbox is a must-have for organizing and transporting your essential tools and accessories. With a compact yet spacious design, the Dekton Toolbox features a total of 7 thoughtfully designed storage compartments, offering ample room for a variety of tools, fasteners, and small parts. Its dimensions—200mm x 410mm x 180mm—provide a perfect balance between portability and storage capacity. The toolbox includes a convenient lift-out carry tray that allows you to access your tools quickly and easily without having to dig through the entire contents. The lid storage compartment is ideal for frequently used items or small tools, ensuring they are always within reach. The robust, durable construction of the toolbox ensures that it can withstand the rigors of everyday use, whether you're working in a workshop, on a construction site, or handling DIY projects at home. Equipped with a durable carry handle, the Dekton Toolbox offers comfortable and secure transport, making it easy to carry your tools to and from job sites. The design not only emphasizes functionality but also ensures that your tools are kept organized and protected. The clear, easy-to-open lid allows for quick visibility and access to your tools, minimizing downtime and enhancing productivity.
